title: Automatic Dog Ball Launcher: Tire Out Your Dog Hands-Free
meta: Automatic ball launchers compared on safety, distance settings, size and indoor use.
intro: An automatic launcher gives high-energy dogs a workout when you're busy. The priority is safety and the right ball size for your dog's mouth.

sections.body: Only use the launcher's matched balls. A too-small ball is a choking risk for big dogs; a too-big one jams the mechanism.
Look for multiple distance settings; the shortest should be safe indoors. Some have a 'scan' safety pause if your dog stands in front.
Battery for yard use, plug-in for indoor. Check which your layout needs.

faq.a: Better for adult dogs that know 'fetch'. Supervise initially and use the correct ball size.

faq.q: Will it work with any ball?
faq.a: No — use only the manufacturer's balls to avoid jams and choking.
